steps.title: Set up the quadratic equation
steps.content: The product of $x$ and $(x-7)$ equals $18$: $$x(x-7)=18 \implies x^2-7x-18=0.$$

steps.title: Solve and identify x
steps.content: Factor: $(x-9)(x+2)=0$, giving $x=9$ or $x=-2$. Since $x$ is positive, $x=9$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
